general_provisions: This bill amends education curricula requirements relating to religious liberty.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>amends curricula requirements to address religious liberty;<hr><ltbullet> amends requirements for higher education graduates; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
